parameters.jsCode:
const recs = ($json.records || []);
return recs.map(r => ({ json: { id: r.id, fields: r.fields } }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ typecast: true, fields: { 'Subject': $('Parse Email').item.json.subject, 'Company': [$('Parse Email').item.json.recordId], 'Direction': 'Outbound', 'Channel': 'Email', 'Body': $('Parse Email').item.json.body, 'Language': $('Parse Email').item.json.language, 'Message Id': $json.id, 'Thread Id': $json.threadId, 'Timestamp': $now.toISO() } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ typecast: true, fields: { 'Status': 'Contacted', 'Last Contact': $now.toISODate(), 'Next Follow-up': $now.plus({ days: Number($env.FOLLOWUP_DAYS) || 4 }).toISODate(), 'Thread Id': $('Gmail: Send').item.json.threadId } }) }}
